zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Mary Holte於1511年出生在英國肯特哈德洛福時，她的父親William Holt32歲，母親Dorothy Ashton32歲。她於1528年與John Arthur Burton of Hadlow在英國肯特哈德洛福結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1593年在她的家鄉享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Mary Holte于1511年出生在英国肯特哈德洛福时，她的父亲William Holt32岁，母亲Dorothy Ashton32岁。她于1528年与John Arthur Burton of Hadlow在英国肯特哈德洛福结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1593年在她的家乡享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Holte
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Bjorg, Erik, Helmer, Hjalmer, Knute, Nels, Nordahl, Selmer, Swen, Thorvald.
North German: habitational name from any of several places so named.

variants.name: Holt
meanings: English, North German, Dutch, Danish, and Norwegian: topographic name for someone who lived in or by a small wood, from Middle English, Middle Low German, Danish, and Norwegian holt, or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word. In England, the surname is widely distributed, but more common in Lancashire and Yorkshire than elsewhere.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Mary Holte was born in 1511, in Hadlow, Kent, England, her father, William Holt, was 32 and her mother, Dorothy Ashton, was 32. She married John Arthur Burton of Hadlow in 1528, in Hadlow, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 3 daughters. She died in 1593, in her hometown, at the age of 82.

Elle a épousé John Arthur Burton of Hadlow en 1528, à Hadlow, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1593, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Mary Holteが1511年にイギリスケントハドロウで生まれた時，父William Holtは32歳，母Dorothy Ashtonは32歳であった。1528年にイギリスケントハドロウでJohn Arthur Burton of Hadlowと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1593年に故郷で82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Mary Holte(이)가 1511년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Holt(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Dorothy Ashton(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1528년 영국 켄트 하들로에서 John Arthur Burton of Hadlow(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1593년 그녀의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Mary Holte родилась в 1511 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия, её отцу по имени William Holt было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Dorothy Ashton, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Arthur Burton of Hadlow в 1528 г. в местности хадлоу, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1593 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 82 лет.
